notes: Mapped core/reducer to L3, daemon/manifest to L2, UI to L1/L2 smoke.
Classified wrapper/process/terminal changes as L2 and covered args, adapter selection, repaint frames, child env, and command forwarding smoke.
Classified shell shim and Windows launch-path changes as L2; added tests for shim idempotence, original Codex path forwarding, .ps1/.cmd launch resolution, and non-TTY stdio fallback.
Classified interactive PTY launcher failure as L2; added regression coverage for PATH/PATHEXT executable expansion and default .ps1 launch resolution.
Classified user-level shell command installation as L2; added tests for generated global functions and multi-profile PowerShell installation targets.

context: codex-hud protected cwd global state fix
notes: Classified global wrapper state fallback as L2 bug fix; added regression tests for user-local CODEX_HUD_HOME defaults and explicit HUD home preservation.
Classified global command semantics change as L2; added regression coverage that the PowerShell shim no longer defines codex and exposes codex-hub plus doctor aliases.
Classified Windows PTY File not found fix as L2; added shim regression coverage for CODEX_HUD_POWERSHELL_BIN and verified doctor exposes an absolute PowerShell path.
Classified terminal renderer metadata expansion as L2; added tests for Codex config parsing, trust/sandbox/MCP/plugin/event diagnostics, and split-line rendering to avoid truncating key fields.
